caption: A video displays a news segment featuring Bola Tinubu, a man wearing glasses and a patterned green and white cap. He is positioned in front of a light-colored background. Overlaid on the footage is a red "PLUS POLITICS" banner and a bold headline that reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". The top of the screen features a white header with the plustv logo and a headline stating, "2023: It’s my lifelong ambition to become President —Tinubu", accompanied by a smaller sub-caption: "Says he has informed Buhari of his ambition 'Adde: I'm kingmaker that wants to become king". At the bottom, a ticker tape scrolls through different web addresses, changing from "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" and "SUBSCRIBE" to "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and "FOLLOW US" alongside social media icons and "PLUSTVAFRICA". The visual content remains largely static across the sequence, with only the scrolling text at the bottom shifting.
